title: neobalanocarpus heimii
intro: Neobalanocarpus heimii, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a tree species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Neobalanocarpus heimii lie in its ability to treat various health conditions due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Studies have shown that the extracts of this plant possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing inflammation, protecting against cell damage, and preventing the growth of bacteria. The herbal preparation of Neobalanocarpus heimii is typically made by infusing its bark and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function.
